patterns.name: Confirmshaming
patterns.description: Using shame or guilt to pressure users into agreeing
examples: No thanks, I don't want to save money
I don't care about my privacy
No thanks. I don't like free things...
patterns.cognitive_bias: Social proof, Fear of missing out

patterns.name: Forced Consent
patterns.description: Making it difficult or impossible to reject consent
examples: I would like to join Backstage Pass & agree to the Terms & Conditions
I agree to receive marketing emails from Natural Life
I accept the Terms & Conditions of the FREE Brother Care Program

patterns.name: Roach Motel
patterns.description: Easy to get in, hard to get out

patterns.name: Sneak Into Basket
examples: 1 Netflix offer: Not available to customers with an active Netflix offer
After 1 year, subscription auto renews with fee

patterns.name: Fake Urgency
examples: FLASH SALE | LIMITED TIME ONLY Shop Now

patterns.name: Nagging / Repeated Interruptions
examples: When you join the PetPlus Plan, you are given the option to purchase your membership
No Worry Membership Renewal We will bill your credit card
You may cancel your JustFab VIP Membership at any time

patterns.name: Social Proof Manipulation
patterns.description: Using fake social validation to influence behavior
examples: 1,142 people have added to cart recently
Michael in Pontiac, United States purchased a
